reviews.text: We used Marry Me In Colorado for our small family wedding ceremony and reception in Estes Park. Since we were coming in from out of town, we had a lot of questions about ceremony location, and Kevin was helpful in getting everything sorted out for us. In fact, we ultimately changed the planned ceremony location the day of due to 40+mph winds from outside to indoors, and the Marry Me team was super flexible. We were really happy with the flowers and cake, officiating, and our interactions throughout the day. Pictures arrived (pictures included with post were taken by Marry Me In Colorado) within a month of our ceremony, and we're grateful for the help Marry Me provided us!

Highly recommend marry me in Colorado! Kevin and his team worked with us very hands on and made the wedding feel completely comfortable and an easy process! They talked us through everything and it was truly perfect! Kennedy was a great photographer as well she really made us feel like we got all the best shots and made taking photos easy and comfortable! Would highly recommend them to anyone getting married in CO!

Kevin and Lori were amazing to work with. I ended up changing my mind on a couple things and they were very accommodating. Our ceremony was perfect and the flowers were absolutely beautiful. It was very low stress and I recommend them to anyone wanting to elope in Estes Park.

You never know what to expect for an elopement but boy was this fun!  Kevin was a pleasure to work with as our officiant and Kennedy was a breath of fresh air as our photographer.  Our day started off with a landslide on the road to Estes Park so a detour was in our future which was going to delay our arrival in RMNP.  Kevin was on it as his sunrise wedding was also late arriving which pushed us back a bit. We got there, met this duo and were married!  During the ceremony a beautiful and very fitting poem was read that brought tears to everyone's eyes.
The only suggestion I would make is this: for each package type that is offered, have a separate form to be filled out as that form is very long and can be confusing trying to figure out which section needs attention.  As the owner, knowing what features come with which package (as well as the customer knowing what they purchased).
The ceremony was gorgeous (albeit 10 degrees and windy at the 3M curve), the photos turned out amazing, my bouquet was exactly as I had pictured, and the cake yummy!

We absolutely loved working with Marry Me In Colorado for our special day because that's exactly what they did - made sure it was OUR special day. They understood what we wanted, kept us in the loop throughout it all and included everything we asked for. The photographer was great as well, gorgeous pictures, and they were even great with our dogs!! Would definitely recommend using Marry Me In Colorado!!!!!
